pulse: Donald tries to be captain; McGregor proves work matters more than titles; Bibi feeds both; Vladimir collects power in silence.
scene: In the galley at midday, Donald's schedule clashed with McGregor's hunger and Bibi's practicality. By afternoon Donald was brooding on the bridge, Vladimir gathering fuel on the frozen deck, Jinping quietly observing in the lounge, McGregor warming by the stove.
